case_title: CHRISTOPHER SCOTT STEVENS VS. PATT SAVASTIANO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEVENS, CHRISTOPHER SCOTT AS TO DEFENDANT SAVASTIANO, PATT AN INDIVIDUAL DBA PACIFIC COAST SERVICES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STEVENS, CHRISTOPHER SCOTT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAVASTIANO, PATT AN INDIVIDUAL DBA PACIFIC COAST SERVICES $4,813.02 PRINCIPAL, $104.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,917.02, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
